name: Chocolate Mocha Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package cooked chocolate pudding and pie filling mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie filling using the directions on the package, stirring in 2 cups of milk.
2. In a small bowl, combine 1 cup hot filling with instant coffee and sugar. Stir to dissolve and blend. Chill.
3. Cool remaining filling for 5 minutes, stirring several times. Pour into crust and chill.
4. Prepare whipped topping mix as directed on the package, using the remaining 1/2 cup of milk and vanilla. Beat chilled pudding until smooth, then fold into whipped topping.
5. Pile lightly over the filling in the crust, spreading evenly. Chill for several hours before serving. Top with chocolate sprinkles if desired. Makes 1 - 8 inch pie.
